svg.title: LLM Pretraining Data Pipeline
svg.desc: A left-to-right pipeline showing the stages of LLM pretraining data processing: Raw web + e-commerce → Dedup (MinHash LSH) → Quality filter (heuristics + perplexity) → Language ID → PII scrub → Domain mix (e.g. 50/50) → Tokenize (custom vocab) → Training.

svg.text: Stages: collection → deduplication → quality → language routing → privacy → sampling → tokenization → GPU training
